MyMembers.name: ITextFileReader
MyMembers.summary: Provides methods for reading text files from the file system, supporting both synchronous and asynchronous operations, single file and directory reads, with optional recursive traversal.

MyMembers.name: GetTexts(string path, bool recursive = false, Encoding? encoding = null)
MyMembers.summary: Reads the text content of all files in the specified directory.
MyMembers.param: The path to the directory to read from.
If true, reads files from all subdirectories recursively. Defaults to false.
The character encoding to use when reading files. Pass null to use the implementation's default.
MyMembers.returns: A containing the text content of each file.

MyMembers.name: GetTexts(DirectoryInfo path, bool recursive = false, Encoding? encoding = null)
MyMembers.summary: Reads the text content of all files in the specified directory.
MyMembers.param: The representing the directory to read from.
If true, reads files from all subdirectories recursively. Defaults to false.
The character encoding to use when reading files. Pass null to use the implementation's default.
MyMembers.returns: A containing the text content of each file.

MyMembers.name: GetText(string path, Encoding? encoding = null)
MyMembers.summary: Reads the entire text content of the specified file.
MyMembers.param: The path to the file to read.
The character encoding to use when reading the file. Pass null to use the implementation's default.
MyMembers.returns: A containing the file's text content.

MyMembers.name: GetText(FileInfo file, Encoding? encoding = null)
MyMembers.summary: Reads the entire text content of the specified file.
MyMembers.param: The representing the file to read.
The character encoding to use when reading the file. Pass null to use the implementation's default.
MyMembers.returns: A containing the file's text content.

MyMembers.name: GetTextsAsync(string path, bool recursive = false, Encoding? encoding = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
MyMembers.summary: Asynchronously reads the text content of all files in the specified directory, streaming each file's content as it becomes available.
MyMembers.param: The path to the directory to read from.
If true, reads files from all subdirectories recursively. Defaults to false.
The character encoding to use when reading files. Pass null to use the implementation's default.
A token to cancel the operation. Defaults to .
MyMembers.returns: An that streams the text content of each file as it is read.

MyMembers.name: GetTextsAsync(DirectoryInfo path, bool recursive = false, Encoding? encoding = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
MyMembers.summary: Asynchronously reads the text content of all files in the specified directory, streaming each file's content as it becomes available.
MyMembers.param: The representing the directory to read from.
If true, reads files from all subdirectories recursively. Defaults to false.
The character encoding to use when reading files. Pass null to use the implementation's default.
A token to cancel the operation. Defaults to .
MyMembers.returns: An that streams the text content of each file as it is read.

MyMembers.name: GetTextAsync(string path, Encoding? encoding = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
MyMembers.summary: Asynchronously reads the entire text content of the specified file.
MyMembers.param: The path to the file to read.
The character encoding to use when reading the file. Pass null to use the implementation's default.
A token to cancel the operation. Defaults to .
MyMembers.returns: A that resolves to the file's text content.

MyMembers.name: GetTextAsync(FileInfo file, Encoding? encoding = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
MyMembers.summary: Asynchronously reads the entire text content of the specified file.
MyMembers.param: The representing the file to read.
The character encoding to use when reading the file. Pass null to use the implementation's default.
A token to cancel the operation. Defaults to .
MyMembers.returns: A that resolves to the file's text content.
